description:
🕒 10:00–14:00

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Eco-Tourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ec-morimana-pukapuka/

Experience river floating on the Iruma River! On this tour, you'll ride a river float and drift peacefully downstream while observing the creatures that live there. You'll also have the chance to catch creatures in the river and go fishing — a full day of river activities. Why not spend a special season with Morimana × River Float, packed with fun and learning?

【Fee】Adults ¥6,000 / Students ¥5,000 / Preschool children ¥3,000 (includes guide, insurance, materials)

【Capacity】15 people per date

【Guide】Mori no Field Gakusha (Forest Field Learning House) staff

【What to bring】Drinks, change of clothes, hat, lunch (and if available, water net and observation case)

【Notes】Mori no Field Gakusha website: https://morinomanabiya168.wixsite.com/website
location: 集合 リバランタハンノウ（飯能市飯能275 国際興業バス「市民会館・博物館」下車徒歩3分）
summary: Iruma River Pukupuka Operation! 〜 Observe river creatures by river float
